549 T3 T3MCARE_CALC_RUG (T3) Medicare Calculated RUG CHAR 5 Multistate supplement: Medicare Case Mix Group. Medicare RUG value calculated by state system.
550 VA01A VA01A_DELIURIUM_TR (VA01A) Delirium Triggered CHAR 1 RAP summary: delirium - triggered. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
